scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @eskerra/mobile && npm run lint -w @eskerra/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -w @eskerra/core && npm run test -w @eskerra/tokens && npm run check:generated -w @eskerra/tokens && npm run test -w @eskerra/ds-desktop && npm run build-storybook -w @eskerra/ds-desktop && npm run test -w @eskerra/ds-mobile && npm run build-storybook-web -w @eskerra/ds-mobile && npm run test -w @eskerra/mobile && node --test scripts/bump-release-version-lib.test.mjs && node --test scripts/sync-app-version-artifacts-lib.test.mjs && node --test scripts/tauri-desktop-build.test.mjs && node scripts/assert-app-versions-align.mjs
